title: quercus × senneniana
intro: Quercus × senneniana is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Quercus faginea and Quercus ilex, commonly known as the ilex oak or holm oak. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus × senneniana are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and neurodegenerative diseases. Quercus × senneniana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
